'''√th-zh-b''' ('''kathazhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:culturalize|culturalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:culturalize|culturalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-zh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kathazhab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thithazhab || jithazhab || shithazhab || kithazhab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuthazhab || jujuthazhab || shushuthazhab || kukuthazhab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuthazhab || juthazhab || shuthazhab || kuthazhab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuthazhab || juthazhab || shuthazhab || kuthazhab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thethazhab || jethazhab || shethazhab || kethazhab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothothazhab || jojothazhab || shoshothazhab || kokothazhab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thothazhab || jothazhab || shothazhab || kothazhab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thothazhab || jothazhab || shothazhab || kothazhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab || thazhab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæthazhab || jæthazhab || shæthazhab || kæthazhab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathathazhab || jajathazhab || shashathazhab || kakathazhab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thathazhab || jathazhab || shathazhab || kathazhab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thathazhab || jathazhab || shathazhab || kathazhab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shathazhab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshathazhab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishathazhab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shathazhabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshathazhabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishathazhabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shathazhabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshathazhabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishathazhabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shathazhabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshathazhabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishathazhabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shathazhabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshathazhabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishathazhabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shathazhabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshathazhabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishathazhabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shathazhabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshathazhabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishathazhabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shathazhabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshathazhabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishathazhabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shathazhabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshathazhabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishathazhabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shathazhabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshathazhabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishathazhabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shathazhabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathazhabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathazhabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shathazhabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshathazhabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathazhabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shathazhabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshathazhabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishathazhabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shathazhabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathazhabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathazhabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shathazhabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshathazhabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathazhabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shathazhabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshathazhabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishathazhabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shathazhabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshathazhabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishathazhabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shathazhabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshathazhabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathazhabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shathazhabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshathazhabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishathazhabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shathazhabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshathazhabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishathazhabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shathazhabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathazhabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathazhabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
